---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
<!-- What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? -->

**The ideal outcome**
<!-- What would "solved" look like from the user's perspective? -->

**Why this matters**
<!-- Who benefits? How often does this come up? -->

**Sketch (optional)**
<!-- Mockups, sample input/output, pseudocode, API shape, etc. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Workarounds you've tried or other shapes this could take. -->
